challenges.title: Midnight Vigil
challenges.description: Stay in a reportedly haunted location for at least 2 hours after midnight and document any unexplained phenomena.

challenges.title: Spirit Board Session
challenges.description: Conduct a documented ouija session with at least 3 participants and record the session in full.

challenges.title: EVP Hunter
challenges.description: Capture at least one unexplained voice or sound on audio recording equipment in a haunted location.

challenges.title: Graveyard Shift
challenges.description: Document and photograph at least 10 graves older than 150 years in a single cemetery visit.

challenges.title: The Long Dark
challenges.description: Spend a full night (8+ hours) alone in a reportedly haunted building without leaving.

challenges.title: Paranormal Investigator
challenges.description: Complete a full paranormal investigation report: history research, site visit, evidence analysis.
